title: nodejs:22 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
nodejs
[1:22.19.0-1]
- Update to 22.19.0
  Resolves: RHEL-111912

[1:22.16.0-2]
- Patch fix for CVE-2025-6965
  Resolves: RHEL-103851

[1:22.16.0-1]
- Update to 22.16.0
  Resolves: RHEL-89600 RHEL-92872 RHEL-92420

[1:22.15.0-1]
- Update to 22.15.0
- Drop upstream patches
  Resolves: RHEL-87319  RHEL-86586

[1:22.13.1-4]
- Patch fix for sqlite CVE-2025-31498
  Resolves: RHEL-87319

[1:22.13.1-3]
- Update c-ares to newest version with fix for CVE-2025-31498
  Resolves: RHEL-86586

[1:22.13.1-2]
- Remove obsolete lua pretransaction script from spec file
  Resolves: RHEL-81119
- Disable npm update notifications for users
  Resolves: RHEL-81158

[1:22.13.1-1]
- Update to version 22.13.1
  Fixes CVE-2025-23083 CVE-2025-23085 CVE-2025-22150
  Resolves: RHEL-76354

[1:22.11.0-1]
- Update to version 22.11.0

[22.4.1-4]
- Initial import of nodeJS 22

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.1-1]
- Rebase to 3.0.1
- Resolves: CVE-2022-25883

[2.0.20-2]
- Patch bundled glob-parent
- Resolves: CVE-2021-35065

[2.0.20-1]
- Rebase to 2.0.20
  Resolves: CVE-2022-3517

[2.0.15-1]
- Resolves: RHBZ#2005419
- Resolves CVE-2020-28469
- Rebase to newest version
- Change source to npmjs.com

nodejs-packaging
[2021.06-5]
- nodejs.req to properly detect bundled deps

nodejs
[1:22.19.0-1]
- Update to 22.19.0
  Resolves: RHEL-111912

[1:22.16.0-2]
- Patch fix for CVE-2025-6965
  Resolves: RHEL-103851

[1:22.16.0-1]
- Update to 22.16.0
  Resolves: RHEL-89600 RHEL-92872 RHEL-92420

[1:22.15.0-1]
- Update to 22.15.0
- Drop upstream patches
  Resolves: RHEL-87319  RHEL-86586

[1:22.13.1-4]
- Patch fix for sqlite CVE-2025-31498
  Resolves: RHEL-87319

[1:22.13.1-3]
- Update c-ares to newest version with fix for CVE-2025-31498
  Resolves: RHEL-86586

[1:22.13.1-2]
- Remove obsolete lua pretransaction script from spec file
  Resolves: RHEL-81119
- Disable npm update notifications for users
  Resolves: RHEL-81158

[1:22.13.1-1]
- Update to version 22.13.1
  Fixes CVE-2025-23083 CVE-2025-23085 CVE-2025-22150
  Resolves: RHEL-76354

[1:22.11.0-1]
- Update to version 22.11.0

[22.4.1-4]
- Initial import of nodeJS 22

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.1-1]
- Rebase to 3.0.1
- Resolves: CVE-2022-25883

[2.0.20-2]
- Patch bundled glob-parent
- Resolves: CVE-2021-35065

[2.0.20-1]
- Rebase to 2.0.20
  Resolves: CVE-2022-3517

[2.0.15-1]
- Resolves: RHBZ#2005419
- Resolves CVE-2020-28469
- Rebase to newest version
- Change source to npmjs.com

nodejs-packaging
[2021.06-5]
- nodejs.req to properly detect bundled deps
